tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block_outbound_icmp"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
